title: Assistant Store Manager - FoodWorld - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - FoodWorld - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
